name: Presentation Dashboard — Dynamic WSL/Tailscale Server
objective: Migrate from static GitHub Pages to a dynamic Node/Express server with chokidar file watching, hosted in WSL2 and published via Tailscale Serve
exit_criteria: npm run build completes without errors
npm start starts Express server on port 3000 (configurable via PORT env)
GET /api/presentations returns live-scanned manifest JSON matching current shape
File changes in html/year10/ are reflected without server restart
Systemd unit file created in deploy/presentation.service
Tailscale serve configuration documented for Windows host
AGENTS.md updated with new deployment model
